name: Torex Gold Resources Inc.
description: Torex Gold Resources is a Canadian gold producer operating the Morelos Complex, a 29,000-hectare land package in Guerrero, Mexico. The company operates the El Limón Guajes open-pit mine and has brought the Media Luna underground project into production, with both operations producing gold, silver, and copper. Torex is a producing miner with ongoing mine-life extension drilling on the broader Morelos land package.
